transfer.workflow.workflowstep.CfnAbout: The basic building block of a workflow.

transfer.workflow.workflowstep.CopyStepD.Description: Details for a step that performs a file copy.   Consists of the following values:   + A description+ An S3 location for the destination of the file copy.+ A flag that indicates whether or not to overwrite an existing file of the same name. The default is `FALSE`.

transfer.workflow.workflowstep.CustomSte.Description: Details for a step that invokes a lambda function.   Consists of the lambda function name, target, and timeout (in seconds).

transfer.workflow.workflowstep.DeleteSte.Description: Details for a step that deletes the file.

transfer.workflow.workflowstep.TagStepDe.Description: Details for a step that creates one or more tags.  You specify one or more tags: each tag contains a key/value pair.

transfer.workflow.workflowstep.Type.Description: Currently, the following step types are supported.   +  *Copy*: copy the file to another location+  *Custom*: custom step with a lambda target+  *Delete*: delete the file+  *Tag*: add a tag to the file
transfer.workflow.workflowstep.Type.Type` <a name=\"cfn-transfer-workflow-w:
copy the file to another location
+  *Custom
